findings.title: spinlock.exe — PyInstaller-packed RAT in system32 (5-source corroboration)
findings.citation: [CORROBORATED: psscan PIDs 3648/12244 + fls inode 7793 + Prefetch SPINLOCK.EXE-1F9810CF.pf + AppCompatCache + FLOSS PyInstaller markers]

findings.title: Zeus rootkit — inline hooks in ntdll.dll (NtCreateThread, NtQueryDirectoryFile)
findings.citation: [CORROBORATED: precooked volatility apihooks (JMP 0x7e3b47 in services.exe) + strings (Gh0st/backdoor/keylogger refs)]

findings.title: Attacker account 'vibranium' — spinlock manifest in user Temp
findings.citation: [CORROBORATED: fls vibranium profile + timeline _MEI122362/spinlock.exe.manifest + psscan spinlock under vibranium session]

findings.title: pe.exe secondary tool spawned by spinlock→cmd chain
logon.scr trojanized screensaver (3-source corroboration)
findings.citation: [CORROBORATED: psscan PID 1324 + fls logon.scr (3 locations) + Prefetch LOGON.SCR-151EFAEA.pf]

findings.title: Admin account creation via net user/localgroup
findings.citation: [TOOL: strings, evidence: xp-tdungan-memory-raw.001, pattern: 'net user /add && net localgroup Administrators']

findings.title: Keylogger references in memory (Keylog-CN, Keylog-SC, KEYLOGGER)
findings.citation: [TOOL: strings, evidence: xp-tdungan-memory-raw.001, multiple keylogger string variants]

findings.title: McAfee AV active but bypassed
findings.citation: [INFERENCE: McAfee processes running (psscan: mfevtps, mcshield, mfefire) yet Gh0st+Zeus+spinlock all active]
